name: Nazeem Hussain
bio: Nazeem Hussain is an Australian stand-up comedian, actor and presenter of Sri Lankan descent whose material often draws on his experience as a Muslim Australian. He rose to prominence in the 2010s as the creator and star of the SBS sketch series Legally Brown and through stand-up touring. His 2019 Netflix special Public Frenemy, filmed at Montreals Just For Laughs festival, broadened his international audience.

timeline.ev: Podcast Burn Your Passport wins iTunes Best Comedy
Orange Is the New Brown airs on Channel 7
Netflix special Public Frenemy released worldwide
Records the special Totally Normal in Brisbane

accolades: Creator and star of Legally Brown
Netflix special Public Frenemy filmed at Just For Laughs
iTunes Best Comedy Podcast 2016 for Burn Your Passport

bits.t: Jokes about Israel for 12 and a half minutes
